div.style: display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3, 80px); gap:10px; justify-content:center; margin:20px auto; background:#f0f4f8; padding:20px; border-radius:8px;
width:80px; height:80px; border:1px solid #142e56; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:28px; font-weight:bold; color:#142e56; background:#fff; border-radius:4px;
